Calendar

Single-date calendar with the month and year dropdown caption used in shadcn's calendar examples.
May 2026
Su Mo Tu We Th Fr Sa

Persian / Hijri / Jalali Calendar

Calendar supports right-to-left Persian date formatting.

Basic

A basic calendar component styled with a rounded border.

Presets
